decisions.decision: Skip publish flows (D-12 deferred to Phase 19.2 or 20)

Agent helps users discover skills; install mutations stay under user control via CLI

decisions.decision: New crate ironhermes-hub (not module in ironhermes-tools)
decisions.rationale: Isolates reqwest/tar/flate2 from core dep graph
SkillSource::Trusted variant + HubConfig + crate scaffold all needed before adapters; no separate Wave 0 plan

decisions.decision: wiremock 0.6 over mockito for HTTP mocking
decisions.rationale: Async-native, tokio-compatible; matches existing async stack

decisions.decision: Plans 01 (10 files) and 02 (11 files) at scope-sanity warning threshold accepted as-is
decisions.rationale: Plan 01 is pure scaffolding (small sibling modules); Plan 02 is structurally-parallel adapters. Split only if execution context overruns.
